article.title: Noizekid: Mexican Moombahton and Dancehall Producer
article.subtitle: Collaborator with DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, and Major Lazer
article.author: D. Varela
article.excerpt: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for his collaborations with prominent names in the music industry. His work is characterized by a distinct production style that blends electronic and dancehall elements.

content.text: Noizekid is a Mexican moombahton and dancehall producer known for working with the likes of DJ Snake, Bad Bunny, Major Lazer and several other names in the music industry.
He released the 'Noizekid Sample Pack' in collaboration with Barnation, which includes all of his samples, loops and drums used in various of his works.
His production choices reflect a blend of electronic and dancehall influences, contributing to a distinct sound within the moombahton genre.
Noizekid's work is situated within a broader scene that includes artists such as ETC!ETC!, Los Dutis, LOOJAN, Bsno, and Freebot.
